---
name: Bug report
about: Something broke or behaved unexpectedly
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What you ran

The exact command or sequence of commands.

```bash
$ npx @pixeldesigns/nexus connect customers.csv
$ npx @pixeldesigns/nexus serve
```

## What you expected

What you thought would happen.

## What actually happened

What you saw instead — with the error message or unexpected output, copy-pasted (not screenshotted if you can avoid it).

```
(paste error output here)
```

## Environment

- Nexus version: `npx @pixeldesigns/nexus --version`
- Node version: `node --version`
- OS: macOS / Linux / Windows + version
- Source type: CSV / XLSX / SQLite / Google Sheets URL

## Anything else

Steps to reproduce, related issues, what you've already tried.
